Last modified: Wed Mar 18 2026 14:45:51 GMT+0900 (Korean Standard Time)

Quick Start

MISP (Open Source Threat Intelligence and Sharing Platform) facilitates the exchange and sharing of threat intelligence, Indicators of Compromise (IoCs).

Login into MISP

MISP default credentials:

Username: admin@admin.test
Password: admin

Reset Password

You can quickly reset it via the command line.

sudo -u www-data /var/www/MISP/app/Console/cake Password admin@admin.test Password1234

Password Policy

  • At least 12 characters long
  • Contains at least one upper-case
  • Includes a digit or special character

All Generator tools are only possibilities without any guarantee!

Tasks to do after first Start

  1. Change site admin password
  2. Activate Feeds
  3. Setup your User

[warning] Remember to change your default password immediately.

Create an Event

You only have to add a few pieces of information to register your Event.
